visualizations.title: Direct Variation Formula
visualizations.description: The algebraic model of direct proportion using the constant of proportionality k.

steps.explanation: y is equal to the constant of proportionality k multiplied by x.
Dividing both sides by x shows that the ratio between y and x is constant.

visualizations.title: Constant Speed Motion (Direct Proportion)
visualizations.description: Watch the car move at a constant rate of 30 pixels per second. Notice how distance and time scale together.
